features.name: SQLite Database Schema
features.description: SQLAlchemy ORM models for users, projects, and tasks. Uses SQLite with file-based storage. Models: User (email, hashed_password, name), Project (name, description, owner_id), Task (title, description, project_id, assignee_id, status).

work_history.note: Existing SQLAlchemy models verified: User, Project, Task with SQLite. All 26 tests pass.

features.completion_notes: SQLAlchemy ORM models for User, Project, Task in src/fixture/models.py. SQLite via src/fixture/database.py. All 26 tests pass.

features.name: Frontend Project Setup
features.description: Next.js 14 app with Tailwind CSS. App Router structure with pages for login, register, dashboard, projects, and tasks. API client using axios with empty baseURL and Next.js rewrites to proxy /api/* to backend port 8000. Use next.config.mjs (not .ts).

work_history.note: Next.js 14 with Tailwind, App Router, axios API client with empty baseURL, rewrites proxy. 21 frontend tests pass.

features.completion_notes: Next.js 14 + Tailwind CSS, App Router with login/register/dashboard/projects/tasks pages. API client uses empty baseURL with /api/* proxy rewrites. 21 frontend tests pass.

features.name: Health Check and App Config
features.description: GET /api/health returns {status: "healthy"}. Backend entry point at src/fixture/main.py.

work_history.note: GET /api/health returns {status: healthy} — already implemented in main.py

features.completion_notes: GET /api/health returns {status, version, timestamp, service}. All tests pass.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: POST /api/auth/register accepts {email, password, name}, creates user with bcrypt-hashed password, returns JWT. POST /api/auth/login validates credentials, returns {token}. GET /api/users/me returns current user profile. JWT middleware extracts user from Authorization: Bearer header.

work_history.note: JWT auth with bcrypt, register/login/me endpoints implemented. Tests passing.

features.completion_notes: POST /api/auth/register, POST /api/auth/login, GET /api/auth/me with bcrypt + JWT. All 26 tests pass.

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Overview page at /dashboard showing project and task counts with quick links.

features.name: Navigation and Layout
features.description: Sidebar navigation with route highlighting and logout button. AuthGuard component protects authenticated routes. Layout component wraps all authenticated pages.

features.name: Project Management
features.description: Full CRUD for projects. POST /api/projects creates project with owner_id from auth. GET /api/projects lists user's projects. GET /api/projects/{id} returns single project. DELETE /api/projects/{id} removes project. Frontend pages: /projects (list), /projects/new (create form).

features.name: Task Management
features.description: Full CRUD for tasks with project assignment. POST /api/tasks creates task with project_id. GET /api/tasks lists user's tasks. DELETE /api/tasks/{id} removes task. Frontend pages: /tasks (list), /tasks/new (create form with project selector).
